name: Artificer
description: Artificers specialize in conjuration and summoning, creating servants and constructs to do their bidding. Their primary spheres of magic are Conjuration and Augmentation.
note: Source doc names this path 'Artifice' in the profession description but 'Artificer' throughout all feat examples. Encoded as 'Artificer'; verify with user.

feats.name: Skilled Summoner
feats.description: Gain summon_familiar as a cantrip (if not already known); its duration becomes Until Dispelled. Creatures summoned from the Conjuration sphere gain additional Vitality equal to 4 × Tier.

feats.name: Tailored Conjuration
feats.description: When you summon or create a creature, it gains a passive ability based on your chosen Study of Lore.

options.label: Arcane
options.description: Reenergize: Once per turn, when summon lands a critical hit, summoner regains mana equal to 3 × summon tier (minimum 3).

options.label: Forbidden
options.description: Siphoned: Once per turn, when summon lands a critical hit, it heals itself equal to summoner's Mind.

options.label: Nature
options.description: Evolve: When summoned, gains one chosen movement type: fly, burrow, or swim.

boons.prompt: Choose movement type for this summon

options.label: Sacred
options.description: Sanctum: Summon can spend 1 AP to grant 2d6 temporary vitality to any target.

options.label: Mortal
options.description: Linked: While summon is in your Engagement, you may use the summon's attribute modifiers. (Source uses 'MHT, DEX, INT' — likely Brawn/Finesse/Mind; attribute mapping needs verification.)

boons.note: Source stat IDs (MHT, DEX, INT) are from a different system. Verify mapping to Brawn/Finesse/Mind/Will.
_review: attribute_borrow had no explicit replace/with; verify mapping

feats.name: Arcane Forgecast
feats.description: Create a permanent Forgecast companion using your chosen Study of Lore. Acts independently but requires the Command action to direct (Command cost always capped at 1 AP). If destroyed, it is repaired by next Daily Preparation.

feats.name: Spheres of Influence
feats.description: Your summoned creatures gain passive effects based on your known Spheres of Magic. Effects apply until the creature is resummoned. Strain on — context: attacks_against_summoner; target: enemies_in_engagement; range: engagement. Shapechange — target_form: tiny_wildlife. Damage bonus — formula: 2d6; damage_type: Arcane; target: enemy. Conditional effect — trigger: on_hit; condition: melee_attack. Divination anchor — description: Divination spells cast upon summon travel with it for spell duration.. Shared vitality — source: summoned_creature; target: summoner (Both take damage when either is hit.).

feats.name: Forgecast Autonomy
feats.description: Once per skirmish, your Forgecast acts independently for one round without requiring the Command action.

feats.name: Reservoir Tuning
feats.description: During Daily Preparation, optionally choose one tuning mode. Can be deactivated during a Respite but cannot be reactivated until next Daily Preparation.

options.label: Efficient Casting
options.description: When casting a spell one tier below your current Tier, reduce mana cost by 2.

options.label: Overcharged
options.description: Direct and zone spell attack rolls and spell DCs gain +2 (including non-Forgecast summons). Mana cost of those spells increases by 4.

feats.name: Modular Adaptation
feats.description: Modify your Forgecast's directive during Daily Preparation. While in any non-Baseline directive, it may only take an action (not a maneuver) on its turn. options.label: Baseline Directive
options.description: Forgecast regains its ability to use both an action and a maneuver on its turn.

options.label: Bulwark Directive
options.description: +2 Armor on the Forgecast. Can intercept one attack per combat directed at you.

options.label: Siege Directive
options.description: Forgecast gains a ranged attack dealing 2d8 Arcane damage.

options.label: Scout Directive
options.description: Cannot attack. Gains 2 zones of movement when dashing. Grants summoner sight and hearing from its position until your next turn.
